Tokenized Deposits Set Up Banking's Next Network Race

US bank regulators to tout deregulatory agenda to lawmakers

holdings.infoBox: KBE is an equity ETF with a total of 103 individual holdings. The top holdings are Voya Financial stock at 1.24%, Triumph Financial at 1.18%, Citigroup at 1.16%, Apollo Global Management at 1.15%, and Cathay General Bancorp at 1.13%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P Bank ETF (KBE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Banks Select Industry index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of US banking firms. KBE was launched on Nov 8, 2005 and is issued by State Street.
